title: Automatic import contact list gmail
excerpt: When you add any gmail account, it would be great if monday calls/retrieves all contacts from contacts.google.com. This way you can assign emails to a certain person/company straight away. This list can be imported in pa…

posts.author: travelintelligence (Wieger)
posts.cookedHtml: When you add any gmail account, it would be great if monday calls/retrieves all contacts from contacts.google.com. This way you can assign emails to a certain person/company straight away. This list can be imported in page “leads” for instance, from there you can assign/move it where-ever you need that contact to go. Inactive/active/etc

posts.author: Webstablish (Joost Ahrens)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @travelintelligence, we just launched an app to sync Google Contacts with monday.com. It automatically keeps your contacts up to date, so no more manual imports or duplicate data entry.

Here’s the link if you want to check it out: Google Contacts Sync. Would love to hear if it helps or if there’s anything missing that you’d like to see!
